title: Crispy Filipino Chinese Broccoli Fritters
description: Savory, golden-fried fritters that combine tender Chinese broccoli with a high‑protein chickpea batter, finished with sesame seeds and scallions for a satisfying crunch.
instructions: Clean and cut the Chinese broccoli into 1–2 cm pieces, rinse, and pat dry.
Marinate the broccoli in the soy sauce, pepper, and a pinch of salt; let sit for 10 min.
In a mixing bowl whisk the chickpea flour, cornstarch, salt, and pepper.
Add water, soy sauce, sesame oil, egg, garlic, and ginger, whisking until a smooth batter forms.
Fold in the marinated broccoli, scallions, and toasted sesame seeds.
Heat 1 tbsp vegetable oil in a skillet over medium‑high heat; test by dropping a spoonful of batter—it should sizzle.
Drop spoonfuls of batter onto the hot oil, flattening gently; cook until edges are golden and crisp, about 2–3 min per side.
Transfer fritters onto paper towels to drain excess oil.
Serve hot with a side of sweet chili dipping sauce or lime wedges.
